capacity_evidence.device: one Blackhole p300c in a 1x1 TTNN mesh
capacity_evidence.failure_kind: TT_FATAL DRAM allocator out of memory
capacity_evidence.explanation: Serialized full translated-layer probes at the preserved batch of 32 passed through device-to-host output materialization at sequence 6528 and failed at the next tile-aligned length, 6560, when the MLP multiply requested a 9.01 GiB bf16 output buffer. At the HF limit, one [batch,32768,23040] bf16 MLP buffer is 45 GiB and gate, up, and product buffers alone require 135 GiB before residuals, weights, caches, and allocator overhead.

optimized_capacity_evidence.device: one Blackhole p300c in a 1x1 TTNN mesh
optimized_capacity_evidence.selected_weight_policy: BFP4_B LoFi projections; prefill weights DRAM interleaved and decode weights DRAM width-sharded
optimized_capacity_evidence.validation: full optimized dense layer with persistent key/value caches and a device-resident output of shape [1,32,6528,3072]
optimized_capacity_evidence.large_m_strategy: attention matmuls use TTNN-selected bounded large-M configs above 1024 rows; dense MLP rows are processed in chunks of at most 1024 and concatenated on device
optimized_capacity_evidence.explanation: The optimized dtype/layout policy changes persistent-cache and weight capacity, so the advertised functional boundary was rerun and passes. The first optimized attempt exposed an explicit large-M L1 circular-buffer request; the bounded large-M implementation fixed it. The optimized pass did not claim a larger context because the complete optimized boundary above 6528 was not re-characterized. Advertised capability is unchanged.

notes: This remains the measured single-device boundary, not a reduced Falcon3 architecture limit. The IR emitted length-128 persistent caches; both functional and optimized implementations parameterize them and default to 6528. Optimized numerical PCC validation covers prefill lengths 17, 31, and 128 plus decode positions 31 and 32, while 6528 is a full optimized dense-layer execution/capacity validation. The optimized pass changed KV-cache dtype to BFP8_B but did not reduce advertised capability.
